title: Resolve Station G2 bridge mapping
description: The station_g2 bridge fragment has no canonical Zephyr target. Add and validate a real board definition or explicitly retire it.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical target builds and reaches bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes fragment and support claims.
close_reason: Explicitly retired station_g2 bridge fragment with STALE comment in overlay+conf; updated capability matrix. Acceptance met via retirement path. No canonical board target exists; consistent with other 2u26.* fragments.
